opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My son had surgery to untwist his testicle four days ago, but tonight the right side has suddenly swollen up to the size of a lemon and is throbbing terribly.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The pain and swelling flared up out of nowhere this evening after he'd been getting better, and we're really worried something has gone wrong with the operation.

symptom_narrative.onset: suddenly this evening, about four hours ago
symptom_narrative.duration: around four hours and it has been getting worse, not better
symptom_narrative.character: throbbing, deep aching pain with the scrotum feeling hard and tight
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: he says it is the worst it has been since the operation — he is guarding it and does not want anything to touch it
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: the right side of the scrotum, at and around the surgical area
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant since it started, worsening over the last few hours
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing much — lying still helps a little
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: moving, standing up and walking to the bathroom
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: he feels a bit warm and slightly sick in the stomach from the pain
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: he had very severe sudden pain on that side once before, which is what led to the operation four days ago
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: he is stuck in bed and walks bent over and carefully when he has to get up

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: surgery four days ago to untwist and fix both testicles
past_medical_history.how_managed: urgent operation, then recovering at home

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: adolescent living at home, parent present and made the call; high family worry about whether the operated testicle is okay

objective_data_offered.value: right side of the scrotum looks swollen 'to the size of a lemon' and the skin over it looks red
the surgical cut looks clean and closed, no fluid or pus leaking from it
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: parent's naked-eye impression of the wound, not a clinical wound assessment

objective_data_offered.value: feels a bit warm / low-grade fever, no shaking chills
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: subjective; no home thermometer reading provided

objective_data_offered.value: passing urine normally, no stinging or burning
resting in bed, guarding the area, walks bent over and slowly when getting up
